TextENGNew: ``...Hey, mister. I've got a favor to ask.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hm? What is it, Mion-chan? You sound awfully formal.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``I'd like you to get me this.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3023. Don't worry, I'll pay for it out of my part-time wages.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The moment Uncle Yoshirou saw the page I was pointing to in the toy catalog, he turned back to me with an expression of utter shock.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``What on earth are you planning to do with this?!@k@vS20/00/VTT_yoshiro3005. --Don't tell me you're planning to rob the post office, Mion-chan...?!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``W-Wait wait wait!@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3025. I'm not that hard up for cash!@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3026. ...And look here, see?@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3027. It doesn't even fire real ammo--not even plastic pellets.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huh? ...Oh, you're right.@k@vS20/00/VTT_yoshiro3007. Even so, Mion-chan... this doesn't seem like something a girl would want.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hmm, you think so?@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3029. A gun and a blade are the flowers of any good raid, don't you think~?@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3030. Ahahahahaha!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...I'll be sure to let Akane-san know about that.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huh?! N-No, I was joking, joking!!@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3032. A-Ahahahaha~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: This is no joke. If that woman heard me say something like that, she'd show me 'hell' without a moment's hesitation...!
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Well, I'll contact the distributor.@k@vS20/00/VTT_yoshiro3010. But it's an import and apparently custom-made, so I can't guarantee when it'll arrive.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hmm... even so, try to get it as soon as possible.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3034. I'm planning to use it as a secret weapon for the coming showdown.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...So what exactly are you going to use it for?``
